description_long: This object is a tall, cylindrical pot containing three large, blooming roses with detailed petals and several green leaves. The roses are white, with each flower head distinct and full, supported by slender stems that rise from the pot. The leaves are broad, dark green, and arranged around the stems, providing a natural contrast to the pale flowers. The pot itself is plain and smooth, with a simple, unadorned surface and a slightly flared rim. The overall appearance is elegant and minimalistic, suitable for both decorative and functional purposes in urban environments. There are no visible labels, patterns, or additional accessories attached to the pot or plant.
description: A tall, plain cylindrical pot holds three large white roses with green leaves, creating a simple yet elegant decorative plant.
description_view_0: Front view shows two large rose blooms facing forward, with green leaves visible at the base and sides of the pot.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the staggered arrangement of the three rose heads and the spread of green leaves around the stems.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the backs of the rose blooms and a denser cluster of leaves at the base.
description_view_3: Angled view reveals the depth of the rose arrangement and the overlapping petals, with leaves extending outward.
